ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the course belongs to */,
  "course_fee" REAL /* Fee for the course */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exam */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "exam_time" TEXT /* Time of the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_exams" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam accepted by the course */,
  "exam_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the exam in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who applied */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course applied to */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam taken by the student */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the student in the exam */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., mark sheet, certificate) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student graduated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, faculty, student) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_scores" (
  "exam_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the exam */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the student in the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_scores_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_payments" (
  "fee_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee payment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the payment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_payments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_payments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship */,
  "scholarship_name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_scholarships" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who was awarded the scholarship */,
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scholarship */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the scholarship was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "scholarship_id")
)
